targets.notes: COMPLETE. All 11 theorems proved, no sorry.

Abstract model COMPLETE (0 sorry, 20+ theorems). Concrete ring-buffer model added: InflightsConcrete, concreteItems, concreteAdd, concreteFreeTo, concreteReset, toAbstract, ring_pos_ne, concreteAdd_abstract. PR #22 open.
COMPLETE. ~45 theorems proved (0 sorry). master invariant valid_preserved_by_all_ops proves INV-1 preserved by ALL operations. PR open (run29 branch).

JointConfig (two Finset Nat). jointVoteResult + jointCommittedIndex. 20+ theorems proved (0 sorry). Won/Lost/Pending iff conditions, empty-config simplifications, safety (joint<=each), monotonicity. PR #24 open.

NEW this run. IsUpToDate (total preorder proof: refl, total, trans, antisymm, higher/lower/same-term rules, iff_pair_ge). findConflictByTerm (structural recursion on Nat: le, zero, none_eq, found_eq, step_eq, term_le, mono_idx). 17+ theorems (0 sorry). PR open (run29 branch).

next_steps: Task5: Inflights - prove concreteFreeTo_abstract: need loop invariant for 'go' recursion. Strategy: refactor concreteFreeTo to use top-level freeToGo def, then prove concreteItems_drop, then prove freeToGo_spec by induction.
Task5: JointQuorum - advance to phase 5. Add jointVoteResult_monotone (more yes votes can't turn Won into Lost) and connection to CommittedIndex.lean.
Task5: LogOrdering - advance to phase 5. Key: strengthen findConflict_term_le to eliminate the 'r = idx' disjunct for non-error cases. Add findConflict_maximality theorem.
Task3/4: New targets - src/raft_log.rs maybe_append/commit_to, or src/read_only.rs read index tracking.
